professionalSummary: Data Analyst with 2+ years of experience delivering data-driven insights and building scalable reporting solutions. Proficient in SQL, Python, and Power BI to analyse large-scale operational datasets, uncover trends, and drive measurable process improvements and optimisation. Adept at translating complex data into clear, actionable insights for both technical and non-technical stakeholders. Holds an MSc in Data Analytics from National College of Ireland, Dublin.

education.institution: National College of Ireland, Dublin, Ireland

highlights: Analysed 50-100 operational access records monthly using Excel, identifying patterns, risk trends, and anomalies that accelerated stakeholder decision-making and reduced repeated access requests

Developed and maintained structured Power BI reporting frameworks tracking 5-10 operational KPIs, improving visibility across teams and enabling faster, more consistent decision-making for senior stakeholders.

Designed and implemented 10+ data-driven operational policies, reducing manual effort in approval workflows by standardising decision criteria and eliminating reporting inconsistencies across the organization.
Presented weekly data findings and operational insights to 3-5 client stakeholders, translating complex data into clear, concise reports tailored for both technical and non-technical audiences.
Collaborated with a cross-functional team of 5-10 members to monitor operational trends, conduct root cause analysis on recurring issues, and implement data-backed process improvements.

projects.name: Business Intelligence & Customer Analytics Platform - Volt Metrics
highlights: Analyzed 80,000+ sales transactions and 7,000+ customer records using SQL and Python to uncover revenue drivers and client purchasing behavior patterns, informing CRM and business strategy.
Built Power BI dashboards with DAX measures and executed customer segmentation identifying four high-value segments, reducing manual reporting by 40% and boosting client response rates by 15-20%.

projects.name: Phishing Detection Using Explainable AI and Transformer-Based Approach.
highlights: Examined 11,000+ real-world URLs to identify behavioral and structural indicators of phishing activity, improving early risk identification, using data pre-processing, feature analysis, and EDA.
Developed a hybrid phishing detection pipeline using RoBERTa embeddings and machine learning models, achieving 97% accuracy and <1% false negatives through statistical evaluation.

projects.name: Healthcare Data Analytics Drug Spending and Facility Analysis.
highlights: Analyzed large-scale healthcare datasets to uncover drug spending patterns and facility-level trends; segmented drugs into 4 cost-based clusters and identified high-cost outliers for cost-control analysis.
Developed classification models to evaluate nursing facility characteristics, informing data-driven organizational decision-making using Logistic Regression and Random Forest techniques.

skillsLineTime.skills: KPI & SLA Reporting, Trend & Performance Analysis, Root Cause Analysis, Enterprise Reporting, Stakeholder Engagement & Data Literacy Support.
skillsLineTime.heading: Data Analytics Strategy

skillsLineTime.skills: Descriptive and Inferential Statistics, Hypothesis Testing, Correlation and Regression Analysis
skillsLineTime.heading: Statistics
